---
title: API Reference
description: Complete API for @justwant/cache.
icon: BookOpen
---

## createCache

```ts
function createCache(options: CreateCacheOptions): CacheInstance
```

| Option | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `adapter` | `CacheAdapter` | Storage backend (required) |
| `plugins` | `CachePlugin[]` | Plugin pipeline |
| `defaults` | `{ ttl?: TTL; tags?: string[] }` | Default TTL and tags |
| `onError` | `"throw" \| "silent" \| "fallback"` | Error behavior |

## CacheInstance methods

| Method | Signature | Description |
|--------|-----------|-------------|
| `get` | `(key) → T \| null` | Get cached value |
| `set` | `(key, value, opts?) → void` | Store a value |
| `delete` | `(key) → void` | Remove a key |
| `has` | `(key) → boolean` | Check key existence |
| `pull` | `(key) → T \| null` | Get and delete |
| `setNx` | `(key, value, opts?) → boolean` | Set if not exists |
| `wrap` | `(key, fn, opts?) → T` | Cache-aside |
| `getMany` | `(keys) → Map<string, T \| null>` | Batch get |
| `setMany` | `(entries) → void` | Batch set |
| `deleteMany` | `(keys) → void` | Batch delete |
| `wrapMany` | `(keys, fetchMissing, opts?) → Map<string, T>` | Batch cache-aside |
| `ttl` | `(key) → number \| null` | Get remaining TTL in ms |
| `expire` | `(key, ttl) → void` | Update TTL for existing key |
| `persist` | `(key) → void` | Remove TTL (make key permanent) |
| `invalidateTag` | `(tag) → void` | Invalidate by tag |
| `invalidateTags` | `(tags) → void` | Invalidate multiple tags |
| `getTagKeys` | `(tag) → string[]` | Get all keys associated with a tag |
| `namespace` | `(prefix, opts?) → CacheInstance` | Create sub-cache |
| `stats?` | `() → CacheStats` | Stats (if statsPlugin) |

## parseTtl

```ts
function parseTtl(ttl: TTL): number
```

Converts a TTL string or number to milliseconds.

## CacheAdapter interface

```ts
interface CacheAdapter {
  get(key: string): Promise<string | null>;
  set(key: string, value: string, opts?: SetOptions): Promise<void>;
  delete(key: string): Promise<void>;
  has(key: string): Promise<boolean>;
  getMany?(keys: string[]): Promise<Map<string, string | null>>;
  setMany?(entries: Array<{ key: string; value: string; opts?: SetOptions }>): Promise<void>;
  deleteMany?(keys: string[]): Promise<void>;
  ttl?(key: string): Promise<number | null>;
  expire?(key: string, ttl: TTL): Promise<void>;
  persist?(key: string): Promise<void>;
  invalidateTag?(tag: string): Promise<void>;
  invalidateTags?(tags: string[]): Promise<void>;
  getTagKeys?(tag: string): Promise<string[]>;
}
```

## TTL type

```ts
type TTL = string | number | Date;
// string: "30s", "5m", "1h", "7d"
// number: milliseconds from now
// Date: absolute expiry time
```
